title: Audiovisual Equipment Installers and Repairers
description: Install, repair, or adjust audio or television receivers, stereo systems, camcorders, video systems, or other electronic entertainment equipment in homes or other venues. May perform routine maintenance.

tasks.text: Install, service, and repair electronic equipment or instruments such as televisions, radios, and videocassette recorders.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Calibrate and test equipment, and locate circuit and component faults, using hand and power tools and measuring and testing instruments such as resistance meters and oscilloscopes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Confer with customers to determine the nature of problems or to explain repairs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Position or mount speakers, and wire speakers to consoles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Instruct customers on the safe and proper use of equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Make service calls to repair units in customers' homes, or return units to shops for major repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read and interpret electronic circuit diagrams, function block diagrams, specifications, engineering drawings, and service manuals.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tune or adjust equipment and instruments to obtain optimum visual or auditory reception, according to specifications, manuals, and drawings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Keep records of work orders and test and maintenance reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Disassemble entertainment equipment and repair or replace loose, worn, or defective components and wiring, using hand tools and soldering irons.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Compute cost estimates for labor and materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
